summary: Completed comprehensive i18n testing for Mar de Cortez app. All translations (English, Spanish, Chinese) are working correctly on Landing page, QuienesSomos page, and Footer component. Language persistence via localStorage verified.
passed_tests: Landing Page - Language Selector: Dropdown opens and shows 3 language options (EN, ES, ZH)
Landing Page - Hero (EN): Title 'Sea of Cortez', subtitle, Login/About buttons translated correctly
Landing Page - Hero (ES): Title 'Mar de Cortez', subtitle, 'Iniciar Sesión'/'Quiénes Somos' buttons translated correctly
Landing Page - Hero (ZH): Title '科尔特斯海', subtitle, '登录'/'关于我们' buttons translated correctly
Landing Page - Features (EN): 'Key Features', Cloud Based, Complete Management, Real-Time Tracking, Supplier Network

Landing Page - Features (ZH): '主要功能', 云端, 完整管理, 实时跟踪, 供应商网络
Landing Page - CTA (EN): 'Ready to transform your purchasing management?'
Landing Page - CTA (ES): '¿Listo para transformar tu gestión de compras?'
Landing Page - CTA (ZH): '准备好转变您的采购管理了吗？'
Landing Page - Registration Form (EN): Labels - Boat Name, Captain Name, Phone, Email, Submit Request

Landing Page - Registration Form (ZH): Labels - 船名, 船长姓名, 电话, 电子邮件, 提交申请

Language Persistence: Language selection persists after page reload via localStorage
context_for_next_testing_agent: i18n implementation is complete and working for all 3 languages (EN, ES, ZH). Landing page, QuienesSomos page, and Footer component all properly use t() function from LanguageContext. Language selector is positioned in top-right corner on Landing page and in the header on QuienesSomos page. Language preference is stored in localStorage and persists across page reloads.
